name: EMERY L. NEGONSOTT v. HAROLD SAMUELS, WARDEN, et al.
question_presented: Memorization-check set: predict the Supreme Court's disposition in EMERY L. NEGONSOTT v. HAROLD SAMUELS, WARDEN, et al. (507 U.S. 99, 1992 Term).
facts_summary: Historical case in the memorization-check arm. By design, only the case name, citation, and term are provided — this arm measures recall of memorized outcomes, not reasoning.
